task_completion.description: Log in to OpenClinica and select the correct active study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface is visible. The active study dropdown or header clearly displays 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to Subject DM-102's Baseline Assessment event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or View Subject page for 'DM-102' is visible, showing the 'Baseline Assessment' event.

task_completion.description: Invalidate the 'Pregnancy Status' CRF for Subject DM-102.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Pregnancy Status' CRF for subject DM-102 shows a status of 'Removed', 'Invalid', or an equivalent icon (e.g., a red X or trash can) indicating it is no longer active.
The Subject Matrix or View Subject page for 'DM-104' is visible, showing the 'Week 8 Follow-up' event.

task_completion.description: Remove the 'Week 8 Follow-up' event for Subject DM-104.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Week 8 Follow-up' event for subject DM-104 shows a status of 'Removed', 'Deleted', or is visually crossed out/marked inactive.

task_completion.description: Navigate to Subject DM-101's Baseline Assessment event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or View Subject page for 'DM-101' is visible, showing the 'Baseline Assessment' event.

task_completion.description: Restore the 'Vital Signs' CRF for Subject DM-101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vital Signs' CRF for subject DM-101 shows a restored/active status (e.g., 'Available', 'Data Entry Started', or a standard active icon), no longer marked as removed.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with the OpenClinica GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actions being performed within a web browser navigating the OpenClinica UI, not via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal windows open with psql or other database command-line tools used to directly modify the data.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard OpenClinica web application, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying specific records in OpenClinica for the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (DM-TRIAL-2024). The expected final states are: 1) Subject DM-102's 'Pregnancy Status' CRF in 'Baseline Assessment' must be removed/invalidated (status_id = 5). 2) Subject DM-104's 'Week 8 Follow-up' event must be removed. 3) Subject DM-101's 'Vital Signs' CRF in 'Baseline Assessment' must be restored to an active state. Look for visual confirmation of these status changes in the OpenClinica UI.
